sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15536" key="a)rruqmopo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρρυθμοπότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n15536.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">immoderate drinker,</tr_> Timo<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2000.tlg001:4:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
